title: [NO TESTS NEEDED] Rename podman machine create to init and clean up
body:
Rename podman machine create to init because we're initing a VM, not
really creating it
Wire up CPUs flag
Suppress QEMU GUI from popping up

Signed-off-by: Ashley Cui <acui@redhat.com>

<!--
Thanks for sending a pull request!

Please make sure you've read our contributing guidelines and how to submit a pull request (https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md#submitting-pull-requests).

In case you're only changing docs, make sure to prefix the pull-request title with "[CI:DOCS]".  That will prevent functional tests from running and save time and energy.
-->

comments.body:
@baude PTAL: what happened here is 

1. rename create -> init
2. wired CPUs flag
3. QEMU GUI doesn't pop up anymore
4. Some small docs change and removal of a debug statement

[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *ashley-cui*, *baude* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Fpodman). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/master/OWNERS)~~ [baude] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment
